summary: Tested asyncio event loop performance fix for SentCom AI Trading Platform. All 14 backend tests passed. The fix successfully prevents synchronous I/O operations from blocking the asyncio event loop. Key findings: 1) All 9 API endpoints return HTTP 200 with valid JSON, 2) Concurrent requests (6+ simultaneous) complete in parallel without blocking each other, 3) Fast endpoints complete quickly even when slow endpoints (like /api/portfolio with Alpaca calls) are running, 4) Frontend loads successfully showing 88% systems ready (7/8 services - only IB Gateway unavailable as expected).

minor.issue: Connection refused - expected as IB Gateway is not available in this environment

details: Alpaca SDK calls wrapped with asyncio.wait_for with 10s timeout
DB calls wrapped in asyncio.to_thread in sentcom_service.py and ai_assistant_service.py
Concurrent requests complete in parallel without blocking

endpoints_tested: /api/portfolio - 200 OK, valid JSON (with positions and summary)

details: Fast endpoints (startup-check, simulation/jobs, ai-modules/status) complete in 0.4-0.5s
Slow endpoints don't block fast endpoints
Overall wall-clock time for 6 concurrent requests: ~1.2s (not 6x sequential)
Startup modal shows 88% systems ready (7/8 services)
Core Systems: Backend API, WebSocket, Database - all Ready
Trading: IB Gateway Unavailable (expected), Live Scanner Ready
AI Systems: AI Assistant Ready, AI Predictions Ready
Main dashboard loads with Command Center, SentCom, Positions, Conversation

critical_code_review_comments: server.py: ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=32) correctly configured in startup_event
alpaca_service.py: ALPACA_CALL_TIMEOUT=10 and asyncio.wait_for wrapping all SDK calls is correct pattern
sentcom_service.py: async _save_chat_message and _cleanup_old_messages correctly use asyncio.to_thread
ai_assistant_service.py: async _get_or_create_conversation, _load/_save/_track methods correctly use asyncio.to_thread
The fix successfully prevents event loop blocking - concurrent requests complete in parallel
context_for_next_testing_agent: Asyncio event loop fix verified. All API endpoints respond with 200 and valid JSON. Concurrent requests work correctly without blocking. IB Gateway is unavailable (expected). Frontend loads with 88% systems ready. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_asyncio_performance.py can be reused for regression testing.
